blocks.body:
This is your About page. Replace this text with your own story.

The admin panel at /admin lets you edit any block here without touching code. Add new sections, reorder them, change the wording — it all saves back to this JSON file.

left.title: What we do
left.body: Describe what you do here. Two or three sentences. Make it specific. Avoid jargon.

right.title: Why we do it
right.body: Describe the motivation. The why is usually more interesting than the what.
